overview: ANSOO Trading Practice is a high-fidelity paper trading app where users practice buying and selling stocks and crypto with a virtual 1 Billion INR balance. Features real-time TradingView charts, a watchlist sidebar, market buy/sell trading panel, and a full portfolio P&L tracker — all in a dark, professional TradingView-inspired interface.
features: Watchlist sidebar with live price updates
Market Buy/Sell trading panel with balance validation
Live price data via HTTP outcalls
